music.title: UBEAT V1
music.usage_basis: Hope explicitly requested use of a different, better sound from his own SoundCloud for his portfolio film.
music.selection_reason: A 4.296-second textural runway gives Hope's voice space, followed by a 123 BPM entrance and thirteen downbeats for an elastic, proof-led edit.

voice.speaker: Hope Atina
voice.used_excerpt: I'm less about talk and more about action.
voice.usage_basis: Hope supplied the talk as portfolio evidence and requested his voice in the social film.
